message:
[review-fix] Match Unicode digit predicates

Series.str.isdigit() and Series.str.isdecimal() were ASCII-only, so Unicode decimal digits and Python digit codepoints diverged from pandas. This was visible next to the recent Unicode string-normalization work and silently returned false for valid digit strings.

Use Unicode General_Category=Nd for isdecimal, layer Python str.isdigit() digit-only extras on top, and add regression coverage for Arabic/Devanagari/Persian/mathematical decimal digits plus superscript, circled, and Ethiopic digits.

Validation: cargo metadata --locked --format-version=1 --no-deps; git diff --check -- Cargo.toml Cargo.lock crates/fp-frame/Cargo.toml crates/fp-frame/src/lib.rs; cargo fmt --check -p fp-frame; ubs Cargo.toml crates/fp-frame/Cargo.toml crates/fp-frame/src/lib.rs; rch exec -- cargo test -p fp-frame; rch exec -- cargo clippy -p fp-frame --all-targets -- -D warnings.

files.patch:
@@ -884,6 +884,7 @@ dependencies = [
  "thiserror",
  "tracing",
  "unicode-casefold",
+ "unicode-general-category",
  "unicode-normalization",
 ]
 
@@ -2218,6 +2219,12 @@ version = "0.2.0"
 source = "registry+https://github.com/rust-lang/crates.io-index"
 checksum = "b7f66b1c8f8caa2ab31dc6d3f35386f16efdab89668f93411e565ac368908e8f"
 
+[[package]]
+name = "unicode-general-category"
+version = "1.1.0"
+source = "registry+https://github.com/rust-lang/crates.io-index"
+checksum = "0b993bddc193ae5bd0d623b49ec06ac3e9312875fdae725a975c51db1cc1677f"
+
 [[package]]
 name = "unicode-ident"
 version = "1.0.24"

@@ -48,4 +48,5 @@ thiserror = "2.0.18"
 # in pay no dependency cost.
 tracing = { version = "0.1.41", default-features = false }
 unicode-casefold = "0.2.0"
+unicode-general-category = "1.1.0"
 unicode-normalization = "0.1.25"
